title: Saddlebag – Wolf Bag, Pet Backpack & Companion Utility
description: Wolf Bag & Saddlebag adds a simple storage system with mouth-carrying and live health indicators
body:
![saddle-bag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a67ea5c2f9e7acc26eb228d72d3dcf2fede58f5.png)
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b63b60b7bf283b18f6a7c732a8a6c26c960f934.jpeg)

**Wolf Saddlebag** adds a practical companion system for **tamed wolves**.  
Your wolf can carry one item in its mouth, wear a visible saddlebag, and store extra items in a clean custom inventory UI.

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fa2cb579820fc2d296d92e8d71c4406c2a726aa.png)

- Open wolf inventory with **Shift + Right Click** (works for owner + tamed wolf only)
- Dedicated **mouth slot** so the wolf can hold 1 item visually in its mouth
- Equip **Wolf Saddlebag** to unlock storage space
- **12 storage slots (4x3)** + separate mouth slot + separate saddlebag slot
- Dynamic portable light from mouth items that emit light
- **Torch / Soul Torch** provide wider light coverage than normal luminous items
- Hold **Shift** and aim at a wolf to show health hearts above the wolf

![How To Use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/595428b56b382ec4ff104d5a95617243390a8731.png)
1. Tame a wolf and make sure it is yours.  
2. Craft a **Wolf Saddlebag**.  
3. Sneak (**Shift**) + Right Click your wolf to open the wolf inventory.  
4. Put the saddlebag in the saddlebag slot to unlock storage slots.  
5. Put any item in the mouth slot (torch is recommended for night exploration).


![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a93a690b715790902b2a8c56158171418ca4443c.jpeg)
